ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
R5py is a Python wrapper for the R5 routing analysis engine. It’s inspired
by r5r, a wrapper for R, and is designed to interact with GeoPandas data
frames.  Similar to r5r, r5py represents a simple way to run R5 locally. It
allows users to generate detailed routing analyses or calculate travel time
matrices using parallel computing, and integrates seamlessly with
Python/Geopandas workflows.

This package contains a sample data set used in the example notebooks.
about.summary: Python wrapper for the R5 routing analysis engine, sample data set covering Helsinki city centre

about.description:
R5py is a Python wrapper for the R5 routing analysis engine. It’s inspired
by r5r, a wrapper for R, and is designed to interact with GeoPandas data
frames.  Similar to r5r, r5py represents a simple way to run R5 locally. It
allows users to generate detailed routing analyses or calculate travel time
matrices using parallel computing, and integrates seamlessly with
Python/Geopandas workflows.

This package contains a sample data set used in the example notebooks.
about.summary: Python wrapper for the R5 routing analysis engine, sample data set covering Helsinki city centre

name: r5py.sampledata.helsinki
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "r5py.sampledata.helsinki" %}
{% set version = "1.1.1" %}
{% set python_min = "3.10" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/{{ name.replace(".", "_") }}-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: e779068e94d94c217a34bd014519b89ce67ac4930ac565ec06d7883981a31ee7

build:
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv
  number: 0

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - setuptools
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}

test:
  requires:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - pytest
    - r5py
  source_files:
    - tests
  commands:
    - pip check
    - python -m pytest

about:
  home: https://github.com/r5py/r5py.sampledata.helsinki
  summary: "Python wrapper for the R5 routing analysis engine, sample data set covering Helsinki city centre"
  description: |
    R5py is a Python wrapper for the R5 routing analysis engine. It’s inspired
    by r5r, a wrapper for R, and is designed to interact with GeoPandas data
    frames.  Similar to r5r, r5py represents a simple way to run R5 locally. It
    allows users to generate detailed routing analyses or calculate travel time
    matrices using parallel computing, and integrates seamlessly with
    Python/Geopandas workflows.

    This package contains a sample data set used in the example notebooks.
  license: GPL-3.0-or-later OR MIT
  license_file:
    - LICENSE
    - GPL-3.0-or-later
    - MIT
  doc_url: https://r5py.readthedocs.io/
  dev_url: https://github.com/r5py/r5py.sampledata.helsinki

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - HTenkanen
    - christophfink
